arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer heir apparent Alexander Nübel’s Bayern Munich salary revealed
arts.sum: But despite occasional friction, Bayern and Nübel have found a way to make the arrangement work, including even a five-year contract extension this past spring after at one point seemingly wanting out of Munich. According to reporting from Sport Bild, the terms of the new deal aren’t half bad — for Bayern or for Nübel’s loan club, VfB Stuttgart.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich prepping for Bundesliga showdown with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has been through Bundesliga battles before, but the meeting with Bayer Leverkusen this weekend holds a little more weight than usual. Of course, in the end it’s about winning, but the way we’re winning games gives us confidence in our strengths.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich very keen on Man City target, player expected to cost €100m next summer
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are keen on bringing Bayer Leverkusen talent Florian Wirtz to the Allianz Arena next summer but the German giants will face strong competition from Man City and Real Madrid. The 21-year-old is one of Europe’s most exciting talents and has developed rapidly ever since making his debut for the Bundesliga champions in 2020. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich wanted to bring back Dante in January?
arts.sum: Back in January when Eric Dier was signed, Bayern had briefly discussed bringing back Dante to the club for six months If you believe the report from Philipp Kessler, as captured by @iMiaSanMia, Bayern considered signing former defender Dante, treble winner with Bayern in 2013, before getting Dier:

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 11: More build-up for Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen; What we’ll learn about Bayern’s backline; Where Bayern stands with Florian Wirtz; Looking at the odd men out at Bayern; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has a massive game ahead with Bayer Leverkusen, but there is so much going on with this squad that we have plenty to discuss. Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen are ready to go!

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich filled with positivity during talks to extend Jamal Musiala
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s Jamal Musiala has the world at his feet. The start of negotiations between Bayern and Jamal Musiala was positive - there was a good conversation last week in Munich.
